title: AI Chat
description: A fully integrated ChatGPT-like AI in Minecraft, no setup needed!
body:
**Ever wanted a quick answer to a question but you're just too lazy to open Chrome and Google it?**

With AI Chat, you can have a fully integrated ChatGPT-like AI in Minecraft, you can ask it questions, ask it to solve math problems and more!

AI Chat uses Groq's AI Database and Meta's Llama model to give you answers in seconds, simply type your question and you have your answer. Simply press I to get started

# FAQ:

- ## Q: Do I need to set up an API key to use the mod?
- A: No, an integrated API key is already set for you, however you can set your own, if you know what you are doing.

- ## Q: Does this cost money?
- A: If you are using your own API key, then yes, but if you don't plan on setting one up, it's completely free!

- ## Q: Is any setup needed for this mod?
- A: No, just install it like any normal mod, drag it in your ```mods``` folder and done!

- ## Q: How would I setup my own custom API key?
- A: Go to https://console.groq.com/keys and create your own, then paste it in the settings section of the mod, and choose your model. 
- MAKE SURE TO KEEP YOUR API KEYS SECRET, ANY MISUSE OF API KEYS IS OUT OF MY CONTROL AND I DO NOT TAKE RESPONSIBILITY IF YOU HAPPEN TO MISUSE THEM.

- ## Q: What model does the integrated AI use?
- A: Currently AI Chat uses Meta's Llama model from Groq.

# Dependencies:
- Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api

# Want to report bugs or request a feature?

**Do it here -->** [Issues](https://github.com/jacobxny/Issues/issues)
